query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN l.corretor_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sem_corretor,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN u.role = 'admin' THEN 1 END) as com_gestor,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN u.role = 'corretor' THEN 1 END) as com_corretor,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretor_id = u.id;
